notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the java-17-openjdk SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 17 CVEs: CVE-2023-21835, CVE-2023-21843, CVE-2023-48161, CVE-2024-21011, CVE-2024-21012, and 12 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
